heading: Gross proceeds as miscellaneous receipts in the Treasury
label: 17706 Gross proceeds as miscellaneous receipts in the Treasury
text: The gross proceeds of each transfer shall be deposited in the Treasury as miscellaneous receipts.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1770640:785., , .Pub. L. 90–135, title I, § 20581 Stat. 443Nov. 14, 1967The words “Notwithstanding the provisions of any other law” are omitted as unnecessary.
